smart_query: Current CO2 levels and climate risks

analysis.summary: Климатичните промени са глобален риск, който изисква вниманието на цялото международно общество. Приоритизацията на устойчивостта е от решаващо значение за бъдещето на човечеството. Целта е да се постигне устойчива цивилизация и достойнство за всички.
key_developments: Prioritising AI data centres could block new homes, builders warn

arxiv_papers.title: LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose a 3D latent representation that jointly models object geometry and view-dependent appearance. Most prior works focus on either reconstructing 3D geometry or predicting view-independent diffuse appearance, and thus struggle to capture realistic view-dependent effects. Our approach leverage

arxiv_papers.title: V2M-Zero: Zero-Pair Time-Aligned Video-to-Music Generation
arxiv_papers.snippet: Generating music that temporally aligns with video events is challenging for existing text-to-music models, which lack fine-grained temporal control. We introduce V2M-Zero, a zero-pair video-to-music generation approach that outputs time-aligned music for video. Our method is motivated by a key obse

podcast: The collaboration will produce a Crisis Counselor Training Curriculum and a statewide AI Harms Reporting Form targeting dangerous AI companion applications | "Our safety and basic rights must not be at the mercy of a company's internal policy; lawmakers must work to codify these overwhelmingly popular red lines into law."
